title: cleome daghestanica
intro: Cleome daghestanica is a plant species in the Cleomaceae family, commonly known as the Daghestan spiderflower or Cleome. It is a flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have contributed to its use in treating conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Cleome daghestanica is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in folk remedies to treat various health benefits, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
